Operation 'listReturns' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. Added context about pagination, filtering capabilities, return type (ReturnsList), and use case for AI agent understanding. Clarified that this is a retrieval operation with query parameters.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all returns with filtering and pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of returns with optional filtering by status, customer, date range, and other criteria. Returns a ReturnsList object containing an array of Return objects and pagination metadata. Supports sorting and filtering to help manage multiple returns across your ecommerce platform.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about pagination, filtering capabilities, return type (ReturnsList), and use case for AI agent understanding. Clarified that this is a retrieval operation with query parameters.

message: Operation 'createReturn' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks all essential details. Added information about expected input (CreateReturnRequest), what is returned (Return object with returnId), and side effects (workflow initiation, notifications). Clarifies this is a state-changing operation that creates a new return record.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new product return request
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new return request for a product. Accepts a CreateReturnRequest object containing order details, line items to return, and reason for return. Returns the newly created Return object with a unique returnId and initial status. This initiates the return workflow and may trigger notifications to the customer and merchant.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks all essential details. Added information about expected input (CreateReturnRequest), what is returned (Return object with returnId), and side effects (workflow initiation, notifications). Clarifies this is a state-changing operation that creates a new return record.

message: Operation 'getReturn' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needed enhancement to specify the returnId parameter requirement, what Return object contains, and the use case for AI agents.

data.current_summary: Retrieve a specific return by ID
data.current_description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific return using its returnId. Returns the complete Return object including status, line items, customer information, and return history. Use this to fetch current return details for display or processing.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needed enhancement to specify the returnId parameter requirement, what Return object contains, and the use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'updateReturn' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is completely insufficient. Added details about returnId parameter, inline request body, return value, partial update support, and side effects (state transitions, notifications). data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing return record identified by returnId. Accepts inline request body with fields to update such as status, customer notes, or return reason. Returns the updated Return object reflecting all changes. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. May trigger state transitions and associated notifications depending on status changes.
data.reasoning: Original description is completely insufficient. Added details about returnId parameter, inline request body, return value, partial update support, and side effects (state transitions, notifications). Clarifies this is a modification operation with potential workflow implications.

message: Operation 'processReturn' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needed significant enhancement to explain the workflow advancement, validation, label generation, status changes, and side effects (notifications, refund initiation). Clarifies this is a state-changing operation with multiple effects.

data.current_description: Processes a return identified by returnId, advancing it through the return workflow. Validates return eligibility, generates return shipping labels, and updates return status to 'processing'. Returns the updated Return object with new status and associated label information. This operation triggers merchant notifications and may initiate refund processing.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needed significant enhancement to explain the workflow advancement, validation, label generation, status changes, and side effects (notifications, refund initiation). Clarifies this is a state-changing operation with multiple effects.

message: Operation 'closeReturn' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague. Added context about returnId parameter, status change to 'closed', archival, return value, side effects (final notifications), and guidance on when to use this operation. Clarifies this is a terminal state operation.

data.description_suggestion: Closes and finalizes a return identified by returnId, marking it as complete in the system. Updates return status to 'closed' and archives the return record. Returns the updated Return object with final status. Closing a return prevents further modifications and may trigger final notifications to customer and merchant. Use this operation after return receipt and refund processing are complete.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague. Added context about returnId parameter, status change to 'closed', archival, return value, side effects (final notifications), and guidance on when to use this operation. Clarifies this is a terminal state operation.

message: Operation 'getReturnLabels' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and specific. Description needed enhancement to clarify returnId parameter requirement, what label data is included (tracking numbers, carrier, URLs), and the context that labels are generated during processing. data.current_description: Retrieves return shipping labels for a specific return identified by returnId. Returns label data including tracking numbers, carrier information, and downloadable label URLs. Labels are generated during return processing and can be retrieved multiple times for printing or customer communication.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and specific. Description needed enhancement to clarify returnId parameter requirement, what label data is included (tracking numbers, carrier, URLs), and the context that labels are generated during processing. data.summary_suggestion: Generate a return shipping label for a return
data.description_suggestion: Generates a return shipping label for the specified return. This label enables customers to ship items back to the designated return destination. Requires the return ID as a path parameter. Returns the generated label details including tracking information and shipping carrier details. The return status may be updated upon label creation.

data.current_description: Create a webhook subscription for return events
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook subscription to receive real-time notifications for return events. Requires the webhook endpoint URL and event types to subscribe to (e.g., return.created, return.status_changed, label.generated). Returns the created webhook object with a unique webhook ID and subscription details. The webhook will immediately begin receiving events matching the configured event types.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a webhook subscription by ID, stopping all event notifications to the associated endpoint. Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter.
